description: Individual tab definition used inside TmTabs. Declares tab header properties (title, icon, badge, disabled) and the content rendered when the tab is active.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional icon name shown before the title.

parameters.name: Badge
parameters.description: Optional badge text/number shown on the tab header.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the tab cannot be selected.

examples.title: Tab panel with icon and badge
examples.code: Notification list here
